lines.original: Kalau cinta sudah dibuang
lines.translation: If love has been thrown away

lines.original: Jangan harap keadilan akan datang
lines.translation: Don't expect justice to come

lines.original: Kesedihan hanya tontonan
lines.translation: Sadness is just a spectacle

lines.original: Bagi mereka yang diperkuda jabatan
lines.translation: For those who are on horseback

lines.original: Wo o ya o ya o ya bongkar
lines.translation: Wo o yes o yes o yes unload

lines.original: Wo o ya o ya o ya bongkar
lines.translation: Wo o yes o yes o yes unload

lines.original: Sabar, sabar, sabar dan tunggu
lines.translation: Patience, patience, patience and wait

lines.original: Itu jawaban yang kami terima
lines.translation: That's the answer we received

lines.original: Ternyata kita harus ke jalan
lines.translation: It turns out we have to go on the road

lines.original: Robohkan setan yang berdiri mengangkang
lines.translation: Knock down the demon standing astride

lines.original: Wo o ya o ya o ya bongkar
lines.translation: Wo o yes o yes o yes unload

lines.original: Wo o ya o ya o ya bongkar
lines.translation: Wo o yes o yes o yes unload

lines.original: Penindasan serta kesewenang-wenangan
lines.translation: Oppression and arbitrariness

lines.original: Banyak lagi, teramat banyak untuk disebutkan
lines.translation: There are many more, too many to mention

lines.original: Hoi hentikan, hentikan jangan diteruskan
lines.translation: Hey, stop it, stop it, don't continue

lines.original: Kami muak dengan ketidakpastian dan keserakahan
lines.translation: We are sick of uncertainty and greed

lines.original: Di jalanan kami sandarkan cita-cita
lines.translation: On the streets we rely on our dreams

lines.original: Sebab di rumah tak ada lagi yang bisa dipercaya
lines.translation: Because at home there is no one you can trust anymore

lines.original: Orang tua pandanglah kami sebagai manusia
lines.translation: Parents see us as humans

lines.original: Kami bertanya tolong kau jawab dengan cinta
lines.translation: We ask, please answer with love

lines.original: O-o-oh!
lines.translation: O-o-oh!
